# BHW Media

> Premium Web Design & Next.js Development Agency. We engineer cinematic, high-converting platforms for SaaS, Web3, and premium brands.

## Core Identity
- **Website**: https://bhw-media.vercel.app
- **Stack**: Next.js 16, React 19, Tailwind v4, Framer Motion, Vercel Edge.
- **Service Model**: 14-day delivery sprint, 100% source code ownership.

## Key Offerings
- **Web Architecture**: Custom Next.js builds with 99+ Core Web Vitals.
- **SaaS Product Design**: High-fidelity UI/UX and design systems.
- **E-Commerce**: Headless Shopify and custom cart infrastructures.
- **Brand Identity**: Authority-driven visual systems and logo architecture.

## Outreach & Audit
- **Free Site Audit**: Custom manual evaluation of performance, conversion, and UX bottlenecks.
- **Diagnostic Wizard**: Interactive funnel at `/audit` for rapid project scoping.

## Navigation
- [Services](/services)
- [Portfolio](/portfolio)
- [Contact](/contact)
- [Diagnostic Wizard](/audit)
